title: SmeltRawOreBlocks
description: A datapack that lets you smelt raw ore blocks.
body:
SmeltRawOreBlocks is a datapack that lets you smelt raw ore blocks (duh).

Smelting a raw ore block takes the same amount of time as smelting 9 raw ore items (1 raw ore block = 9 raw ore items). # Screenshots ### Furnace ![Raw iron block in furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0877f22880aed687b3510d3602a5b0ab574ddd77.png) ![Raw copper block in furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44ed3f816e1a650cf127fb4354f13d032235cbfa.png) ![Raw gold block in furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47453b5eb1fcc0a2e3ef06714207b421ac965b08.png) ### Blast furnace ![Raw iron block in blast furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cfd9a2dafadd7d5e76b2d1531c8dbd7a56a77a1.png)![Raw copper block in blast furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/336bd008db16422879215576a68a55d1391f1f26.png)![Raw gold block in blast furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/855c2eebb45de75c8f6999166575a0dddb55fa9b.png)
